betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Antimatter§f is exotic matter that annihilates on contact with normal matter.

§eTask:§f Obtain 1x §bAntimatter Barrel§f (barrel_antimatter)

§eObtaining:§f
• §bParticle Accelerator§f - Primary production method
• Some Cyclotron reactions produce small amounts

§eStorage:§f
§c§4CRITICAL:§f Must store in §bHeavy Magnetic Storage Tank§f!
Normal tanks cause annihilation → explosion.

§eUses:§f
• §bBalefire Rocket Fuel§f (BF Fuel) - Most powerful rocket fuel
• Advanced physics experiments
• End-game energy applications

§aTip:§f Small amounts go a long way. Handle with extreme care.
